subject: IPN triangulation of GRB020914
body:
r Williams     Sat Sep 14 12:29   31/1443  File_s102256_12.70_predse                                                         U 56 Ne
 U 56 Neil Gehrels       Sat Sep 14 13:57   67/2560  Re: Thursday lunch
 U 57 HETE Operator      Sat Sep 14 22:51   45/1810  Trigger Notice
 U 58 Roger Williams     Sun Sep 15 00:14   49/2223  File_hsi_20020913_225050.
 U 59 Roger Williams     Sun Sep 15 00:14 12831/346782 File_hsi_20020913_225050.
 U 60 Roger Williams     Sun Sep 15 11:27 19400/1648063 File_qp102258_2A1_04.11_0
? set askcc
? mail
To: gcn
Subject: IPN annulus for GRB020914
Cc:
K. Hurley and T. Cline, on behalf of the Ulysses, Konus, and HETE GRB teams,

E. Mazets and S. Golenetskii, on behalf of the Konus-Wind GRB team, report:


Ulysses and Konus-Wind observed this GRB at 78798 seconds.
We have triangulated it to an annulus with raidus 39.932 +/- 0.066 degrees
(3 sigma) centered at RA, Decl (2000)=170.909, 39.244.  More details
can be obtained for this event at a later time.

^C
(Interrupt -- one more to kill letter)
^C"/export/home/khurley/dead.letter" 11/410
Interrupt
? mail
To: gcn
Subject: IPN annulus for GRB020914
Cc:
K. Hurley and T. Cline, on behalf of the Ulysses and Konus GRB teams,and

E. Mazets and S. Golenetskii, on behalf of the Konus-Wind GRB team, report:


Ulysses and Konus-Wind observed this GRB at 78798 seconds.
We have triangulated it to an annulus with radius 39.932 +/- 0.066 degrees
(3 sigma) centered at RA, Decl (2000)=170.909, 39.244.  More details
can be obtained for this event at a later time.
